creator: statue@softwareliberty.org
text:
TeX/LaTeX is a set of printing softwares, of which excellent and elegant
output quality have been admiring and adopting out of the academic circles
for several years. ChiTeX/ChiLaTeX let you use Chinese Big5 codes in
TeX/LaTeX documents. Operations with the ChiTeX are easy enough just like
the English TeX, apart from some special instructions in it. For more
information, refer to the homepage of professor Chen Hung-Yih:

WWW: http://www.math.ncu.edu.tw/~yih/intro.htm

- Shen Chuan-Hsing
statue@freebsd.sinica.edu.tw
